docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT ALLEGHENY CASUALTY COMPANY BALLESTRASSE BAIL BONDS
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALLEGHENY CASUALTY COMPANY BALLESTRASSE BAIL BONDS $15,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $108.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $15,108.00

MOTION TO VACATE SUMMARY JUDGMENT AND SET ASIDE BAIL FORFEITURE, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY DEFENDANT BALLESTRASSE BAIL BONDS HEARING SET FOR NOV-20-2001 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 302, MOTION TO VACATE SUMMARY JUDGMENT AND SET ASIDE BAIL FORFEITURE, CALENDAR OF NOV-20-2001, GRANTED PURSUANT TO WRITTEN ORDER WITHOUT PREJUDICE. DEFT TO PREPARE ORDER.
